ab: Nga’ay kako a micaliw to payso iso haw?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: Nga’ayto, hakowa ko caliwen iso?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: Matawalay ako a miala ko payso ako, nga’ay micaliw Kako to payso i tisowanan haw?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Cowa ka piala kako to payso!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: Matawala ako a mihawikid ko payso. nga’ay kako a micaliw i tisowanan haw?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Ayyah, yamicaliwan iso i ’ayaw caho kapatikolen iso i takowanan.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: Nga’ay kako micaliw to riko’ iso haw?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: Nga’ayto, kiso to ko mialaay.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: Nga’ay kako micaliw to tilid iso haw?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: Mapacaliwayto ako ci Ciyaw.
en: B: I lent it to Ciyaw.

ab: Pacaliwen kako to tingsa iso haw!
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: Hayda, nikawrira patikolen ano papacem.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: Ma’oradayto, cowa ka piala kako to linay, pacaliwen Kako haw?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: Cecay ko linay ako, cacayat han ita!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: O micaliwan ako i ’ayaw kona tilid, patikolen ako.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: Ano sapi nengnengan haca kiso to tilid sowalen kako.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: Ano hacowa kako a patikol to payci i tisowanan.
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: Mamaan saw? ano irasato ko payci iso itiya hanto.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: Ano hacowa patikol kiso to payso i takowanan?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: Ano papacem kako a patikol.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: Ano hacowa patikol kiso to tilid i takowanan?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: Patikolan to ako i nacila kiya saw?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: Ona impic omipacaliwan ni Kacaw i tisowanan haw?
en: A: Did Kacaw lend you this pen?

ab: Hay, omicaliwan ako anini i cingraan.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: Ona impci i omi caliwan iso ci Kacawan haw?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Kacaw?

ab: Cowa, o mi’acaan ni ina.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: Awaayto ko cinah, katayra ci panayan amicaliw to cinah.
en: A: We're out of salt, go borrow some from Panay.

ab: Hayda, tayra kako a micaliw.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: Papi patikolen ci Panay to payso i takowanan.
en: B: Go tell Panay to pay me back.

ab: Hakowaay ko kiyam niira saw?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
